meaning: Master of Patent Law 专利法硕士
examples: Help file, home page and MPL license.
The Flex 3 SDK will be free and will most likely be MPL licensed.
We will also offer a dual license for OEMs who are unable to bundle MPL software.
Contact was lost with MPL on 3 December when it turned to enter the Martian atmosphere.
Nasa's efforts to locate MPL are continuing with cameras on board the orbiting probe Mars Global Surveyor scanning the planet's surface.
